title: China’s Electrostate Is Poised to Win From War in the Middle East
description: A cluster of Chinese firms is poised to win big from the energy crisis set off by the war in the Middle East, building on booming investment in artificial intelligence.
content:

title: Second attack at Sam Altman's house in two days after Molotov scare
description: A second alarming incident at OpenAI CEO Sam Altman’s San Francisco residence within 48 hours has intensified concerns around rising tensions linked to artificial intelligence. Following a Molotov cocktail attack, a suspected firearm discharge near the property has led to fresh arrests, raising questions about safety, motives and the broader climate surrounding AI leaders.
content:
